body:

Now that I've had time to read the full Mueller Report, I've blogged about my take on it.Click the link below to read more. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jisuyid-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jisuyid-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Murder Capital](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jisuyid-kujkulhluu-d/)
If you were asked "what country has the highest murder rate in the world?" what would you say? Afghanistan? Iraq? Syria? Yemen? No, it's the country I just left this morning - El Salvador.Click the link below to read more. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jisuyid-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jisuyid-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [The Dems' First 100 Days](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jisuyid-kujkulhluu-u/)
Well, it's been 100 days now since Nancy Pelosi was sworn in again as Speaker, and Democrats took over the U.S. House of Representatives. So how much have they been able to accomplish?Click the link below to read more. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jisuyid-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jisuyid-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [Where the Democrats Want to Take Us](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jisuyid-kujkulhluu-n/)
If you can't win fair and square, change the rules, rig things more to your liking. That's what Washington Democrats are trying to do. This week I'm on the blog talking about the Democrats' first bill, H.R. 1, and what exactly is in it.Click the link below to read more. Peter \--

America is an idea. Based on a founding principle that all men are created equal.

It's an idea that's stronger than any army, bigger than any ocean, and more powerful than any dictator.

It gives hope to the most desperate people on Earth. It instills in every single person in this country the belief that no matter where they start in life, there's nothing they can't achieve if they work at it.

**Today, that idea is under attack.**

We've got a president who assigns a moral equivalence between those spreading hate and those with the courage to stand against it.

A president who, like most charlatans and demagogues throughout history, seeks only to aggrandize himself, to consolidate his own power \-- by blaming the "other."

If we give Donald Trump eight years in the White House, he will forever and fundamentally alter the character of this nation.

I cannot stand by and watch that happen.

Our core values, our very standing in the world, our democracy, and everything that makes us who we are is at stake.

**That's why I'm announcing my candidacy for President of the United States.**

It's time to get up and remember who we are.

We're Americans: tough, resilient, but always full of hope.

name: Cory Booker
subject: Biden's decision
body:
| | |
---
| Vice President Biden is officially running. Team -- there is no doubt his decision could shake up the race. More voices make us a stronger party, but even I admit it's getting hard to keep track of how many Democrats are running for president. As of today, we're at 20 candidates. **The truth is this poses a real challenge for an underdog campaign like ours.** Space on the debate stage is limited, and we know the DNC will decide who makes it based in part on how many donors each campaign has. [_**Will you help guarantee my spot by making a donation today?**_](https://act.corybooker. "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-jb-em?refcode=em_fr_20190425_CB_20190425-fr-CB-jb-actives_2020ndnr_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Some campaigns begin with a massive head start when it comes to fundraising, but I haven't spent the last few years building a massive online donor base. We chose a difficult path -- from Day One, we've refused to take money from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists. I'm proud of the way we're building this campaign together. **That means I need you.** With so many great Democrats running, I'm not asking you to support me and only me. There's a lot of time left to decide who should be our party's nominee. [_**But if you believe I 'm worth taking a chance on -- if you want my voice in the national debate -- your donation today would mean so much.**_](https://act.corybooker. "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-jb-em?refcode=em_fr_20190425_CB_20190425-fr-CB-jb-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thank you, Cory
[](https://act.corybooker. "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-jb-em?refcode=em_fr_20190425_CB_20190425-fr-CB-jb-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc76e2/5fca0d19/1ddc93bd/291ae177/2611441233/VEsA/ "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc76e2/5fca0d19/1ddc93bd/291ae176/2611441233/VEsB/ "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc76e2/5fca0d19/1ddc93bd/291ae175/2611441233/VEsO/ "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. name: Kamala Harris
subject: Twenty candidates
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE
body:
|
#
I’m sure you saw the news: As of this morning, my friend Joe Biden is now running for president. And you know what I say to that? **The more, the merrier!** Joe brings a wealth of knowledge to the race, and I’m excited to debate ideas and policy with him and the many other candidates running for president in the coming months. It’s still very early in this primary election -- and as we press forward, we’ll see the issues develop and which candidates emerge as the strongest to win this election and take on Donald Trump. Let me be clear: I intend to win. But with a primary field this crowded, it’s on us to find new ways to cut through the noise and reach more voters. It’s going to take a lot of resources. That’s why I’m asking again: **Can you add a donation of $1 or more today? name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: I can explain why this is happening
body:
| | Peter, You know our society is abandoning biblical standards when Mike Pence has been mercilessly attacked by the “tolerant left” the past few weeks for his Christian belief on marriage. And just recently, the mainstream media came after me for saying that the biggest threat to the moral fiber of the U.S. is the illusion that there is no gender, an issue where the church has become alarmingly silent. Just look at the so-called “Equality Act” endorsed by many of the liberal 2020 presidential candidates that would allow men to play on women’s sports teams. **We have largely deserted the biblical standards of family, the view that there is no such thing as maleness or femaleness anymore, and that marriage doesn't really matter. How has this happened?** As a musician, I like to think of it this way. Before I play a piece of music, I must first tune the instrument to the musical standard. Even the most virtuosic musician will only make noise if his or her instrument isn’t tuned to a fixed absolute note on the musical scale. When every instrument in the band plays according to its own standard of tuning, the result is chaos and noise. You’ll end up with a result that is anything but beautiful. I didn’t make the rules, God did. And if I refuse to ignore or deny God's law or natural law, and if I fail to tune my life to those standards, how can I hope to make music of my life? Let me put it this way. If Christians fail to tune our actions and, most importantly, our votes to God’s biblical standard, how will we advance His purposes? **There are 90 million Christians in America. An estimated 25 million sit on the sidelines in presidential elections, and millions who do vote, don’t know what it looks like to align their vote to God’s standards.** For too long, millions of Christians have become far more than silent; we’ve become fragmented. Secular ideas, instead of God’s standards, guide people’s votes and the result is anything but beautiful. **[But you can help change that](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p190425apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190425apl01nd&n=1).** When we send election reminders and resources to 90-million Christians, we’re making sure the full orchestra is on stage and prepared for the concert. Imagine if only the bass players and cymbals showed up! **And by providing Christian voter guides covering all 100,000 elections in 2020, we can create music that is heard loud and clear in our communities and across the country.** If we are serious about making a difference, we have to take action now. **[I’m asking you again to make a financial contribution to help us fund Christian voter guides and mobilization efforts](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p190425apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190425apl01nd&n=2).** This is one of the most valuable things you can do not only for your community and state, but most importantly, for your grandchildren and future generations. Thank you for standing with us. [](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p190425apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190425apl01nd&n=3) **United. We Stand.**

Gov. Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190425apl01nd&n=4)
---

subject: Border Patrol Says Apprehensions in the Rio Grande Valley Have Already Surpassed All of 2018
body:
"Less than seven months into the fiscal year, the number of undocumented immigrants who have been apprehended or turned themselves in..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=06cfe0a8f8&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Border Patrol Says Apprehensions in the Rio Grande Valley Have Already Surpassed All of 2018**

“Less than seven months into the fiscal year, the number of undocumented immigrants who have been apprehended or turned themselves in to U.S. Border Patrol agents in the Rio Grande Valley has already surpassed last year’s total,” Julian Aguilar reports for _The Texas Tribune_.

“The increase is the result of an ongoing surge of migrants, most of them from Central America, who are crossing the border to seek asylum. The 2019 total for the Rio Grande Valley includes 15,310 unaccompanied minors apprehended from October through March — compared to 23,760 during the entire 2018 fiscal year.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f19949d200&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “One of the proudest moments of my life was standing beside President Donald J. Trump in the Oval Office to witness him sign the First Step Act, a historic criminal-justice reform bill that would make American communities safer, improve hundreds of thousands of lives and change the way we think about prisons,” Senior Advisor to the President Jared Kushner writes in _[TIME](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7c0e72fb80&e=3ee4985eea)_. “America’s democracy is the greatest governing system in the world. It was designed to be stubborn and slow, yet open to change when enough citizens agree on needed progress.”
---
|
---
| “With House Democrats in full witch-hunt mode, President Trump is unquestionably right to dismiss them — that is, to cite executive privilege and other legitimate reasons to frustrate Rep. Jerry Nadler & Co.’s fishing expeditions,” the _[New York Post](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a7b0089314&e=3ee4985eea)_ editorial board writes. “Nadler’s Judiciary Committee is looking to win points with the Democratic base by conducting endless re-investigations of everything covered by special counsel Bob Mueller’s extensive probe.”
---
|
---
| “Speaking at the 2019 Rx Drug Abuse & Heroin Summit at a downtown Atlanta hotel, the first lady said saving Americans from opioid addiction was an issue ‘close to all of our hearts,’” [FOX 5 Atlanta](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7384cc91e9&e=3ee4985eea) reports. “I have seen firsthand the medical and personal results of this crisis,” Mrs. Trump said, highlighting her experiences touring medical facilities as part of her “Be Best” initiative. “Speaking about the damage the epidemic has inflicted on families, the first lady said she and the administration are committed to supporting additional treatment facilities that would help ‘both mothers and babies recover and replace the bond of addiction with the bond of love.’”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3cae676088&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0b5da2aa7f&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=50b2a17275)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

body:
I just watched another frontrunner enter this race. | | |
---
| |
---
| | I just watched another frontrunner enter this race. And frankly -- I welcome it. I truly believe Americans deserve to hear from as many quality Democrats as possible. [_**Which is why, now more than ever, I critically need your help to ensure I meet the criteria to participate in the Democratic debates. I 'm less than 8,000 donors away from securing my spot and sharing my vision on that stage. >> **_](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcd44/3eb3e2fc/4c31a756/7449f19b/2033766690/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/juliandebate?refcode=20190425_em_fr_b1_castro_all&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=25") Look, I know I'm not a frontrunner in this race. But I wasn't born a frontrunner. I didn't grow up a frontrunner. _**And I know this country wasn 't built by frontrunners either. **_ It was built by families like yours and mine who toiled to achieve opportunity. I want to share my story on that debate stage, because it's the story of so many families like yours -- and you deserve a voice up there speaking for you. * * *

Peter \--

America is an idea. Based on a founding principle that all men are created equal.

It's an idea that's stronger than any army, bigger than any ocean, and more powerful than any dictator.

It gives hope to the most desperate people on Earth. It instills in every single person in this country the belief that no matter where they start in life, there's nothing they can't achieve if they work at it.

**Today, that idea is under attack.**

We've got a president who assigns a moral equivalence between those spreading hate and those with the courage to stand against it.

A president who, like most charlatans and demagogues throughout history, seeks only to aggrandize himself, to consolidate his own power \-- by blaming the "other."

If we give Donald Trump eight years in the White House, he will forever and fundamentally alter the character of this nation.

I cannot stand by and watch that happen.

Our core values, our very standing in the world, our democracy, and everything that makes us who we are is at stake.

**That's why I'm announcing my candidacy for President of the United States.**

[Peter, are you with me? We haven't always lived up to our founding ideals. But we have never before walked away from them.

I'm running to help make sure we never do.

| | | It's true, victims of workplace harassment deserve a voice. [**_See below and sign on in support of the Be HEARD Act._**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113c71/622b7b5b/1f505587/307b5c19/1981112558/VEsH/ "https://www.paction.us/be-heard/dws-congress?utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=1+-+See+below+and+sign+on+in+support+of+the+&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_JA_D2_190425_1_2_2&source=DWS_EM_JA_D2_190425_1_2_2")

\--- Original Message ---

Friend,

If someone is the victim of workplace harassment, they deserve to be heard. Full stop.

Unfortunately, there's currently no mechanism in place to stop harassers from using their power and privilege to hide their wrongdoings. Democrats in the House intend to fix that.

[**_The Be HEARD Act will shore up protections for victims of harassment in the workplace. Will you sign on in support of this important legislation?_**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113c71/622b7b5b/1f505587/307b5c18/1981112558/VEsE/ "https://www.paction.us/be-heard/dws-congress?utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=2+-+The+Be+HEARD+Act+will+shore+up+protectio&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_JA_D2_190425_1_2_2&source=DWS_EM_JA_D2_190425_1_2_2")

[](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113c71/622b7b5b/1f505587/307b5c1b/1981112558/VEsF/ "https://www.paction.us/be-heard/dws-congress?utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_JA_D2_190425_1_2_2&source=DWS_EM_JA_D2_190425_1_2_2")
This legislation, of which I am a co-sponsor, will extend the statute of limitations for reporting, require workplaces to adopt a non-harassment policy, and establish a program to ensure low-wage workers are able to access legal counsel.

[**_It 's the right thing to do. Join us in supporting the Be HEARD Act._**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113c71/622b7b5b/1f505587/307b5c1a/1981112558/VEsC/ "https://www.paction.us/be-heard/dws-congress?utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=4+-+Itrsquos+the+right+thing+to+do+Join+us+i&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_JA_D2_190425_1_2_2&source=DWS_EM_JA_D2_190425_1_2_2")

Thank you,

Debbie

name: Brad Komar, Team Hickenlooper
subject: Our competition in this primary
body:
There are now 20 candidates in the Democratic primary. What's next? | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377169b/691c9bd/6cb21e31/11a4ac2b/1791826843/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-em-apr?refcode=em_template")
---
| Team, as you've probably heard, we have a lot of competition in this primary, including--as of today--a former vice president. You might even be asking this question right now: What next?

Our response is this: **We 're all in. We have an experienced candidate who knows how to bring people together and get big things done, and we couldn't ask for a better team than this one to help us propel John to the front of the pack in this contest.**

[**_Can you make your first donation today to help us reach our goal of adding 65,000 supporters to this team and spread John 's story across the country?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377169b/691c9bd/6cb21e31/11a4ac28/1791826843/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-em-apr?refcode=em_fr_20190425_BK_20190425-fr-BK-competition-ndnr_ndnr_l1&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

We're aware of how large the field is. But John's the only one in this fight who has stood up to the NRA and won, who crafted methane standards that have become the model for fighting climate change, and who understands what it's like to face a shifting economy and respond by building a flourishing small business. His story and his record of accomplishment motivates us, and we know it will resonate with the American people.

What also makes us proud and fired up to fight for John is the support of this incredible team. Your passion and commitment thus far in this primary have blown us away--and we know that, with your support, more and more people will become aware of all that John has to offer.

[**_Today, as the field gets even more crowded, can you help us raise the resources we need and reach our goal of adding 65,000 supporters to share John 's story with voters across the country?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377169b/691c9bd/6cb21e31/11a4ac29/1791826843/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-em-apr?refcode=em_fr_20190425_BK_20190425-fr-BK-competition-ndnr_ndnr_l2&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Thank you,
Brad

_Any amount helps --most people are giving $14--and every dollar goes toward helping me build the strongest possible campaign._
As of this morning, there are 20(!) declared candidates in this race, so the DNC may limit the list of debate participants based on who does and doesn't have 65,000 individual donors to their campaign.
I need to be on the debate stage so I can make the case for the issues that are important to so many Americans.
I'm the only mom with young kids in this field. That matters. It gives me a unique perspective and voice on critical issues like gun violence, education, health care and climate change.
I'm an unequivocal fighter for women's rights. No other candidate has been as outspoken as I have on sexual assault in the military or on college campuses, and you can count on me to always advocate for reproductive freedom.
And I'm not afraid to call Donald Trump what he is: a coward.
As president, I will fight for what's right--especially when it's hard--like I've done my entire career. I need to be on the debate stage to talk about all of this and more.
If you agree, can you donate right now (any amount really helps) to become one of the 65,000 donors I need? The DNC will be checking to see which candidates have hit that number, and we need to make sure I'm one of them:

Thanks for everything--I'm really grateful we're in this fight together.

Kirsten

name: Bernie 2020
subject: Joe Biden
body:
Today is a very important day for our campaign:
# [](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8915?t=1&akid=1164%2E150750%2EJvBfdl)

Friends -
This campaign was never going to be easy.
From the start, we knew it would take an unprecedented grassroots effort in order to win this nomination.
Not only are we taking on a political and corporate establishment that will do and spend whatever it takes to stop us, but we are running against a record number of candidates at the same time.
And today, there is one more candidate in the race.
That makes today a big day for our campaign — and an important moment to show that we are the ones who can beat Trump and transform this country. So we are asking – especially today:
[**Can you make a $3 contribution to our campaign today? We’ll put it right to work on the fight to win this nomination, while sending a message that ours is the campaign that will beat Trump and transform our country.**](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/10584?refcode=em190425-2-15&t=26&akid=1164%2E150750%2EJvBfdl)
There are a lot of candidates in this race right now. But there is only one Bernie Sanders. You know that. Let’s have a big day for our campaign today. This is important. So thank you for contributing to our fight.
All my best,
Faiz Shakir
Campaign Manager
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/10584?refcode=em190425-2-15&t=27&akid=1164%2E150750%2EJvBfdl)

PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402

In fact, there is no single greater source for our campaign's fundraising than emails like this one. And that's important, because no one person, not even Bernie Sanders, can take on Trump and the billionaire class alone.

Before you go about the rest of your day, help power our fight against the billionaire class by [making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-email-template?refcode=em-footer&t=30&refcode2=1164_150750_JvBfdl&akid=1164%2E150750%2EJvBfdl).

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: MSNBC has noticed the border crisis. Will Congressional Democrats?
body:
President Donald J. Trump was among the first to call attention to the growing crisis on America’s southern border. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a23c4a9669&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • April 25, 2019
---
| | |
# **MSNBC has noticed the border crisis. Will Congressional Democrats?**

**President Donald J. Trump** was among the first to call attention to the growing crisis on America’s southern border. Most important, he was also the first to take action, issuing a national emergency in February that put more resources behind the hardworking law enforcement officers who safeguard our immigration system.

**Critics called that emergency** a “manufactured” crisis. That’s a convenient argument, because if they pretend a problem doesn’t exist, they don’t have to try to solve it.

**But even MSNBC** —not exactly most Americans’ idea of a hard-right news outlet—is challenging that narrative. Today, the cable network highlighted the surge of alien families overwhelming communities near our border, speaking with a San Diego shelter that has seen its resources overstretched by the recent influx.

**“American communities** are struggling to deal with the surging numbers of families who are crossing into the United States,” MSNBC’s Craig Melvin reported. “ICE tells us that their transportation is completely overwhelmed. CBP used the word ‘strained.’ That is the situation of many of these cities,” reporter Mariana Atencio added.

**“When you look** at the numbers, it doesn’t seem like it’s going to stop any time soon.”

**That situation** is a far cry from how Congressional Democrats described the problem at our southern border just a few weeks ago. The full extent of the crisis remains underreported, but it’s encouraging to see mainstream media attention finally being given to the communities most affected by the recent illegal immigration surge.

**Congress has stayed on the sidelines** for far too long. Voters across the political spectrum agree that America needs a safe, lawful, and fair immigration system. How much worse does the problem need to get before Washington finally delivers?

[President Trump is taking action to reduce visa overstays and uphold our laws.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5e5389172e&e=3ee4985eea)

**In case you missed it** : [Watch the President visit the border in Calexico, California](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3f66301501&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **Kids get a behind-the-scenes look at the White House**

**President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump** have hosted some very special guests at the White House this week. It started on Monday, when the First Family welcomed children for the 141st White House Easter Egg Roll. More than 30,000 people celebrated with the President and First Lady on the South Lawn.
🎬 **Watch:** [The 141st White House Easter Egg Roll](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=eb656df47d&e=3ee4985eea)
**The fun continued today,** when hundreds of children got a behind-the-scenes look at the White House during the annual “Bring Our Daughters and Sons to Work Day.” Children of both White House staffers and the press corps toured the grounds and participated in a special kid-friendly briefing with Press Secretary Sarah Sanders—including a drop-in visit from Vice President Mike Pence.

**President Trump** concluded the festivities by greeting children on the South Lawn.

[Take an inside look at Bring Our Daughters and Sons to Work Day at the White House!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b68de91d7d&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|

More than 30,000 people celebrated with the President and First Lady on the South Lawn. 🎬 Watch: The fun continued today, when hundreds of children got a behind-the-scenes look at the White House during the annual “Bring Our Daughters and Sons to Work Day.” Children of both White House staffers and the press corps toured the grounds and participated in a special kid-friendly briefing with Press Secretary Sarah Sanders—including a drop-in visit from Vice President Mike Pence.
